blur_detection.recommendation: Enhance the image sharpness before OCR processing.

contrast_assessment.recommendation: Adjust contrast levels to ensure clear text differentiation.

tears_or_folds.recommendation: No action needed regarding tears or folds.

missing_sections.recommendation: No action needed regarding missing sections.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, and itemDescriptionLineItems. The payment was completed, and the actual amount charged is specified, confirming it as an expense document.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: Six out of eight required fields were found, confirming the document as an expense. The payment was completed, and the actual amount charged is specified.

extraction.special_notes: Este correo electrónico puede ser una de las muchas notificaciones que reciba mientras el vendedor completa su pedido.

issues.description: The receipt is missing a unique invoice or receipt number.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Document must contain a unique invoice or receipt number for identification.

issues.description: The item description is too vague and does not clearly specify the goods or services purchased.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Receipt must specify the goods or services purchased with clear description (expense type/description).

issues.description: The VAT amount is not clearly listed on the invoice.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: VAT amount should be clearly shown on the invoice if applicable.

issues.description: The transaction amount will be subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.
issues.recommendation: All expenses will be processed via receipts and invoices. All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Per diems will not be used, instead all expenses will be processed via receipts and invoices. All expenses are subject to taxation review based on actual amounts.

issues.description: Additional documentation is required for the expense reimbursement request.
issues.recommendation: Include details (date of expense, business purpose, and merchant name) with all submissions. Expenses must be submitted within 6 months after the date that the expense was incurred. Client line manager must review and approve expenses before payroll cutoff date.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Include details (date of expense, business purpose, and merchant name) with all submissions. Expenses must be submitted within 6 months after the date that the expense was incurred. Client line manager must review and approve expenses before payroll cutoff date.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including missing invoice number, vague item description, unclear VAT amount, and requires additional documentation for reimbursement. These issues need to be addressed to ensure compliance with GoGlobal's policies and Spain's regulations.
